about_me: I am working a Software Engineer since Feb 2020. From Raw PHP to ReactJS, I've honed HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Ajax, JSON, and CodeIgniter 3 & 4. Currently crafting seamless user experiences with ReactJS, NextJS, Bootstrap 4 & 5, and CSS, I'm passionate about Front-End. Aspiring to be a Full Stack Engineer, I'm excited by challenges turned into innovative solutions. Let's connect and explore the ever-changing tech landscape!
meta_keywords: Software Engineer, Shahadat Hossain, Raiyan, SHR47, #shr47, PHP Developer, ReactJS Developer, React, ReactJS, JS, JavaScript, Web Developer, Software, Engineer, PHP, Codeigniter

experience.description: Working here as a front-end developer. Using ReactJS. Learning NodeJS and trying to get the MERN Stack as well. Making a Recruitment System.
Worked here as a PHP Developer too, but on a Framework called Codeigniter. Focused on rest api based back-end and also front-end. Also worked on JavaScript. Made a Ticket Management System.
Worked as a PHP Developer. Focused on raw coding for backend. Also worked on Vanilla JavaScript. Made some big projects like ERP & Some management system.
